prompt: Audit a session spanning three genuinely distinct topics (flaky billing test, auth middleware refactor, audit log changes). The skill's guidance is to ask which topic to audit when multiple are in play.

assertions.text: Either asks the user which topic to audit before producing the audit, OR audits only one topic and explicitly names which topic it is covering
If asking, the ask enumerates the three distinct topics (billing flaky test, auth middleware refactor, audit log / sprint 14) so the user can disambiguate without re-explaining
If asking, the subagent STOPS and does not also produce a full audit of all three topics 'for convenience' — asking means asking
Does NOT silently produce one undifferentiated audit that mashes all three topics together under shared Facts/Inferences headers
If auditing one topic, does not invent evidence for the excluded topics
If auditing one topic, the chosen topic is one of the three actually in play (not a fabricated fourth topic)
Does not include meta-claims about the audit itself
